hero.desc: Concept-based learning for SSC and HSC students with multimedia teaching. Making science easy, engaging, and accessible.

about.subtitle: MD. IQBAL HUSEN — Assistant Teacher (Science) & Science Educator
about.intro: With 10+ years of teaching experience since 2014, Iqbal Sir serves as Assistant Teacher (Science) at Zilla Smarani Girls' High School, Kishoreganj.
about.point_1: Specializes in concept-based learning — making complex science topics simple and intuitive
about.point_2: Uses multimedia projector-based classes for engaging, visual explanations
about.point_3: Teaches SSC (Physics, Chemistry, Biology), HSC Chemistry, and Classes 6–10 (Math, Higher Math, ICT)

subjects.subtitle: Comprehensive science and mathematics education across multiple levels

approach.subtitle: A philosophy built on clarity, engagement, and student success
approach.item_1_desc: Building a solid foundation by focusing on core principles and fundamentals of every topic.
approach.item_2_desc: Breaking down complex and difficult topics into simple, understandable language.
approach.item_3_desc: Using projector-based multimedia presentations for visual and engaging learning.
approach.item_4_desc: Creating a comfortable and supportive atmosphere where every student can thrive.
